auth.label: API Key
auth.description: SSLMate API key used with the Authorization Bearer header for Cert Spotter. Find it on your SSLMate API keys page: https://sslmate.com/account/api_keys

actions.name: delete_monitored_domain
actions.description: Delete one monitored domain configuration from the connected Cert Spotter account.

name.description: The monitored domain name. Prefix with a leading dot to cover the entire subdomain tree.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one monitored domain.

deleted.description: Whether the monitored domain was deleted.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for deleting one monitored domain.

actions.name: get_monitored_domain
actions.description: Get one monitored domain configuration from the connected Cert Spotter account.

name.description: The monitored domain name. Prefix with a leading dot to cover the entire subdomain tree.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one monitored domain.

name.description: The monitored domain name. Prefix with a leading dot to cover the entire subdomain tree.

enabled.description: Whether Cert Spotter monitoring is enabled for this domain.

domain.description: A monitored domain object returned by the Cert Spotter monitoring API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for retrieving one monitored domain.

actions.name: list_certificate_issuances
actions.description: List certificate issuances for one domain from the Cert Spotter CT Search API.

domain.description: The registered domain or subdomain to search in the CT Search API.

after.description: Return issuances discovered after the issuance with this Cert Spotter ID.

include_subdomains.description: Whether to include issuances for subdomains of the requested domain.

match_wildcards.description: Whether to include wildcard certificates that match the requested domain.

items.description: One Cert Spotter expand field such as dns_names or issuer.caa_domains.

expand.description: Repeatable Cert Spotter expand fields to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing certificate issuances from Cert Spotter.

id.description: The opaque Cert Spotter issuance identifier.

tbs_sha256.description: The SHA-256 digest of the CT TBSCertificate.

cert_sha256.description: The SHA-256 digest of the certificate or precertificate.

items.description: One DNS name covered by the certificate issuance.

dns_names.description: Expanded DNS names covered by the certificate issuance.

pubkey_sha256.description: The SHA-256 digest of the certificate public key.

pubkey_der.description: The base64 DER-encoded certificate public key when expanded.

pubkey.description: Expanded metadata about the certificate public key.

not_before.description: The certificate not-before timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

not_after.description: The certificate not-after timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

anyOf.description: The RFC 3339 revocation time, or null when not revoked.
The RFC 3339 timestamp when Cert Spotter last checked revocation status.

revocation.description: Expanded revocation metadata returned by Cert Spotter.

anyOf.description: Instructions for reporting certificate problems, or null when unavailable.

cert_der.description: The base64 DER-encoded certificate or precertificate when expanded.

items.description: A certificate issuance object returned by the Cert Spotter CT Search API.

issuances.description: Certificate issuances returned by the Cert Spotter CT Search API.

retryAfterSeconds.description: The Retry-After header in seconds when Cert Spotter suggests how long to wait before polling again.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing certificate issuances from Cert Spotter.

actions.name: list_monitored_domains
actions.description: List monitored domains configured in the connected Cert Spotter account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing monitored domains.

name.description: The monitored domain name. Prefix with a leading dot to cover the entire subdomain tree.

enabled.description: Whether Cert Spotter monitoring is enabled for this domain.

items.description: A monitored domain object returned by the Cert Spotter monitoring API.

domains.description: Monitored domains returned by the Cert Spotter monitoring API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing monitored domains.

actions.name: upsert_monitored_domain
actions.description: Create or update one monitored domain configuration in the connected Cert Spotter account.

name.description: The monitored domain name. Prefix with a leading dot to cover the entire subdomain tree.

enabled.description: Whether monitoring should be enabled for this domain.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating or updating one monitored domain.

name.description: The monitored domain name. Prefix with a leading dot to cover the entire subdomain tree.

enabled.description: Whether Cert Spotter monitoring is enabled for this domain.

domain.description: A monitored domain object returned by the Cert Spotter monitoring API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for creating or updating one monitored domain.
